scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-town/shared-types && npm run build -w @ai-town/sim-core && npm run build -w @ai-town/game-renderer && npm run build -w @ai-town/content-data && npm run build -w @ai-town/ai-bridge && npm run build -w @ai-town/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/sim-core && npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/game-renderer && npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/content-data && npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/ai-bridge && npm run typecheck -w @ai-town/desktop
scripts.clean: find apps packages -type d \( -name dist -o -name node_modules -o -name .vite \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
